sentences.arabic: كَانَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ رَحِيمًا جِدًّا بِالْأَطْفَالِ وَالضُّعَفَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Vjerovjesnik, s.a.v.s., je bio veoma milostiv prema djeci i slabima.
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet (peace be upon him) was very merciful towards children and the weak.

sentences.arabic: رَوَى الْبُخَارِيُّ أَنَّ الرَّسُولَ كَانَ يُقَبِّلُ الْحَسَنَ وَالْحُسَيْنَ وَيَلْعَبُ مَعَهُمَا [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ الْأَدَبِ].
sentences.translation: Buhari prenosi da je Poslanik ljubio Hasana i Husejna i igrao se s njima [Bilježi Buhari u Knjizi o adabu].
sentences.translationEn: Al-Bukhari narrated that the Messenger used to kiss al-Hasan and al-Husayn and play with them [Narrated by al-Bukhari in the Book of Manners].

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الرَّحْمَةُ تَدُلُّ عَلَى رِقَّةِ قَلْبِهِ وَعَظَمَةِ خُلُقِهِ.
sentences.translation: Ova milost ukazuje na nježnost njegovog srca i veličinu njegovog morala.
sentences.translationEn: This mercy indicates the tenderness of his heart and the greatness of his character.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَيْنَا أَنْ نَقْتَدِيَ بِهِ فِي تَعَامُلِنَا مَعَ الصِّغَارِ.
sentences.translation: Moramo ga slijediti u našem ophođenju sa mlađima.
sentences.translationEn: We must follow his example in our dealings with children.

sentences.arabic: التَّوَاضُعُ وَاللِّينُ مِنْ أَهَمِّ دُرُوسِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Poniznost i blagost su među najvažnijim lekcijama iz Poslanikovog životopisa.
sentences.translationEn: Humility and gentleness are among the most important lessons from the Prophetic biography.
